name: Melina and Ranni, Level drain for Miquella
description:
NTR warning

"Struggle all you like lowly tarnished, your runes, strength, virility, size and life will all slowly ebb away. Your power and life force sustenance for our true lord miquella. I could almost mistake myself and say you are enjoying this?~ Are you so depraved as to feel elated to lose to us?~ How filthy even for you~ Perhaps if you are lucky Miquella will permit you to watch as he ravish our bodies with his divine rod and fills us with his little godly seed"

After being Charmed by Miquella, Ranni and Melina turned in his faithful servant bitch with the only intent of obtaining rune from male to give them to him.

Source: https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=14400012&tags=ranni_the_witch+melina_%28elden_ring%29+
